publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Malkǝʾa ʾabuna Takla Hāymānot
msItem.incipit:
Fols 1r–1v ሰላም፡ ለፅንሰትከ፡ ወለልደትከ፡ እምከርሥ፡ አመ፡ ፳ወ፬ ለወርኀ፡ ታሕሣሥ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ በኩሉ፡ ወበውስተ፡ ኩሉ፡ ውዱስ፡ ናሁ፡ ወጠንኩ፡ ወእቤ፡ እምስብሐቲከ፡ ሐዲስ፡ በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሰላ፡ ለዝክረ፡ ስምከ፡ ዘጥንተ፡ ፊደሉ፡ መስቀል፡ ስም፡ ክቡር፡ ወስም፡ ልዑል፡ ተክ፡ ሃ
ይ፡ ማቴዎስ፡ በዓለ፡ ቀዳማይ፡ ወንጌል፡
msItem.explicit:
Fols 22r–22v ወግብረ፡ ዘወሀብከኒ፡ ፈጸምኩ፡ ፈጽሞ፡ እንዘ፡ አሐሥሥ፡ በረከተከ፡ አዕደወ፡ ልብ፡ በአንሥኦ፡ እለ፡ መርሐ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወጴጥሮስ፡ ከመ፡ ሐሠሡከ፡ በተማልዓ፡ ተክ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ውሁደ፡ ሰአልኩከ፡ በአስተብቍዖ፡ ለጻድቅሰ፡ ኅዳጥ፡ ቃል፡ ይበቍኦ፡ ተሰጥ
ወኒ፡ እግዚኦ፡ እግዜኦ፡ ኦአምላከ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ዕቀበኒ፡ እመከራ፡ ሥጋ፡ ወነፍስ፡ ሊተ፡ ለገብርከ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም፡
ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወዓሜን።

msItem.title: Saʾali lana Māryām saʾali lana Māryām ḫaba waldǝki ḫer madhane ʿālam
msItem.incipit:
Fol. 24r ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ማርያም፡ ተአብዮ፡ ነፍስየ። ለእግዚአብሔር፨ በል፡ ፫ ጊዜ፡ በስመ፡ አብ፨ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፨ ቅዱስ፡ ሥላሴ፡ ብሂልየ። ወጠንኩ፡ ዘለኪ፡ ውዳሴ፡ ማርያም፡ እሕቱ፡ ለሙሴ። ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ማርያም፨ ብፅዕት፡ አንቲ፡ ወንግሥተ፡ ጽድቅ፨ ዘትሜንኒ፡ ማርያም፡ መንበረ፡ ስለቅ፡ ታቦትነ። አንቲ።
እንተ፡ ወርቅ፡
msItem.explicit: Fols 36r–36v ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ማርያም። ኢትዝክሪ፡ ብነ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ ማርያም፡ እሙ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ በኪዳንኪ፡ ድንግል፡ ተማኅፀነ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ማርያም፡ አሰምኢ፡ ለኃይልኪ፡ ድምጾ፡ ለፀርነ፡ ዘልፈ፡ ዘየዓቅጾ፡ እስመ፡ አብዘሀ፡ ትውክልተ፡ ወዓምጾ፡ ሰአሊ። ማርያም፡ ንዒ፡ ንዒ፡ ንዒ። ማርያም። ዘትነብሪ፡ በአርያም፡ ወንዒ፡ ሠናይትየ፡ ዘገነት፡ ዔዶም።

Fols 36v–37r ኦእግዝእትየ፡ ማርያም። ድንግል። ወላዲተ። መለኮት። ጸሎትኪ፡ ወስእለትኪ፡ ይቀበኒ፡ እመከራ፡ ሥጋ፡ ወነፍ
ስ፡ ለኃጥዕ፡ ገብርኪ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም፡
ወምስለ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ በመንፈስ፡ ኄር፡ ወምዕመን፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ ዓሜን፡ ወዓሜን። ። ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን፨ ። ።
msItem.note: The text is an excerpt from the initial part of the prayer, with some omissions.

msItem.title: Sǝbḥāta fǝqur za-Giyorgis
msItem.incipit:
Fol. 38r ነዓ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ነዓ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ነዓ፡ ጊዮር፡ እንዘ፡ ትሰርር፡ በፈረስ፡ ወነዓ፡ ፍቁርየ፡ ዘልዳ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ሰአል፡ ለነ፡ ገዮ፡ ናቄርብ፡ ለከ፡ ስብሐተ፡ ወጋደ፡ ለጊዮርጊስ። ኮከበ፡ ልዳ፡ ከመ፡ ታኅነኒ፡ እመ፡ ቅሠፍት፡ ወእዳ፡ ሰአ፡ ለ፡ ጊዮ፡ ዘርግብ፡ ፍልስጥኤማዊ፡ ኵከብ፡ እሥእለከ፡ በአብ፡ እበረ
ከትከ፡ ለኵልነ፡ ኃብ፡
msItem.explicit:
Fols 42v–43r ሰአ፡ ለነ፡ ጊዮ፡ ጊዮ፡ አንተ፡ ኮከበ፡ ልዳ፡ ፍቅርከ፡ ለልብየ፡ ዘዓደዳ፡ በስእለትየ፡ ኢታውህዳ፡ ጸሐፉ፡ ወትረ፡ በሰሌዳ፡ ሰአ፡ ጊዮ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ አንተ፡ ፍቁርየ፡ ሰማዕተ፡ አብ፡ ወአቡየ፡ በጺሐከ፡ ነዓ፡ ሃቤየ፡ እናኅሲ፡ ሊተ፡ ጌጋይየ፡ ኦአምላከ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ዕቀበኒ፡ እመከራ፡ ስጋ፡ ወነፍስ፡ ሊተ፡ ለገብርከ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም።
ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: Kidān za-nagh
msItem.incipit:
Fol. 44r ኪዳን፡ ዘነህ፡ ዘነገሮሙ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወአምላክነ፡ ወመድሐኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ለአሰርቱ፡ ወክሌቱ፡ አርዳኢሁ፡ ድኅረ፡ ትንሳኤሁ፡ ቅድመ፡ እርገቱ፡ በስጋ፡ ለመድሀኒነ፡ ዘመላ፡ ሰማያተ፡ ወምድረ፡ ቅድሳተ፡ ስብሃቲሁ፡ ጸሎቱ፡ ወበረከቱ፡ የሃሉ፡ ምስለ፡
ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሥሉሥ፨ እግዚአብሔር፨ ሕያው፡ ተሠሐለነ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለአምላክነ፡ ርቱዕ፡ ይደሉ፡ አጽንዑ፡ ሕሊና፡ ልብክሙ፡
msItem.explicit: Fols 54v–55r ንትአቀብ፡ ስማዕ፡ ዘለዓለም፡ ንጉሥ፡ መዓስበ፡ ናዝዝ፡ እጓለ፡ ማውታ፡ ተወከፍ፡ ሲሩያን፡ በምሕረትከ፡ ኣንቅሕ፡ አብዳነ፡ አጥብብ፡ ወኅጉላነ፡ ሚጥ፡ ወለእለ፡ ውስተ፡ ሞቅህ፡ አድሕን፡ ወለኩልነ፡ ኩን፡ ፀወነ፡ እስመ፡ ለከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ አምላክነ፡ ወንግሥት፡ ቡሩክ፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፡
msItem.incipit: Fol. 56r ይካ፡ ጸጋሁ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ የሃሉ፡ ምስሌክሙ። ይሕ። አዕኩትዎ፡ ለአምላክነ፡ ይሕ። ርቱዕ፡ ይደሉ፡ ይካ፡ ለከ፡ ለአብ፡ ዘኢይማስን፡ ምድኃኔ፡ ነፍስነ፡ ወመሰረተ፡ ጥባባት፡ ዓቃቤ፡ አልባቢነ፡ ዘእንተ፡ ውሥጠ፡ ዓይነነ፡ አብራህከ፡ ለነ፡ በጽልመተ፡ ሕሊናነ፡ በዘዚአከ፡ እእምሮ፡
msItem.explicit: Fol. 59r ሀብተ፡ ጸጋ፡ ወኃይል፡ ለከ፡ እንዘ፡ ንዌድስ፡ ወኢንዓርፍ፡ ለዝሉፉ፡ በአልባቢነ፡ ናስተማስል፡ አምሳለ፡ መንግሥትከ፡ ቦቱ፡ በእንቲአከ፡ ወበእንተ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወልድከ፡ እንግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ዘቦቱ፡ ለከ፡ ስብሐት፨ ወእኂዝ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሚን። ። ። ። ።
msItem.note: The text seems to have been copied with omissions and transposition of some passages. The passage (ኪዳን፡ ዘግነህ፡) ዘነገሮሙ፡ እግዚእነ፡... is attested only in some manuscripts. The beginning the work (ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡...) and the text until fol. 45v correspond to Chrestomathia Aethiopica edita et glossario explanataAugustDillmannLipsiaeT. O. Weigel1866https://archive.org/details/bub_gb_V2XoxZmczckCEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866ChrestomathiaEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866Chrestomathia, p. 46, first paragraph (from ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሥሉስ፡ to ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሥሉስ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው፡ ተሠሐለነ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለአምላክነ፡). The following text on fols 45v–48v corresponds to Chrestomathia Aethiopica edita et glossario explanataAugustDillmannLipsiaeT. O. Weigel1866https://archive.org/details/bub_gb_V2XoxZmczckCEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866ChrestomathiaEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866Chrestomathia, 48, second paragraph to p. 49, end of the first paragraph (from ስብሐት፡ ለአምላክነ፡ ርቱዕ፡ ይደሉ፡ አጽንዑ፡ ሕሊና፡ to ወመንከር፡ ስምዕከ፡ ወበእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ንህነ፡ አግብርቲከ፡ ንሤብሀከ፡ እግዚኦ፡). The further text on fols 48v–54r corresponds to Chrestomathia Aethiopica edita et glossario explanataAugustDillmannLipsiaeT. O. Weigel1866https://archive.org/details/bub_gb_V2XoxZmczckCEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866ChrestomathiaEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866Chrestomathia, 46, last paragraph to p. 48, end of the first paragraph (from ኪያከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ለገባሬ፡ ኵሉ፡ ለዘኢታስተርኢ፡ አምላክ፡ to ለትውልደ፡ ትውልድ፡ ዘኢየሀልቅ፡ ዓለም፡ ዓለል፡ ዓሜን፡). The ultimate part on fols 54r–59r corresponds to Chrestomathia Aethiopica edita et glossario explanataAugustDillmannLipsiaeT. O. Weigel1866https://archive.org/details/bub_gb_V2XoxZmczckCEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866ChrestomathiaEthiopicLiteraturebm:Dillmann1866Chrestomathia, 49, beginning of the 2nd paragraph to the end of the edited text (from ንሣልሥ፡ ለከ፡ ዘንተ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ስብሐተ፡ ዘወሀብከነ፡ to the end).

msItem.title: Malkǝʾa madḫāne ʿālam
msItem.incipit: Fol. 62r ሰላም፡ ለዝክረ፡ ስምከ፡ ዘኢረከቡ፡ ተፍጻሜተ፨ መላእክተ፡ ሰማይ፡ ወምድር፡ እለ፡ ለመዱ፡ ስብሐተ፨ መድኀኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ተወከፍ፡ እንተ፡ አቅረብኩ፡ ንስቲተ፨ ዘሰተይከ፡ በእንቲአየ፡ ከርቤ፡ ወሐሞተ፡ በሞተ፡ ዚአከ፡ ከመ፡ ትቅትል፡ ሞተ፡ ሰላም፡ ለሰእርተ፡
msItem.explicit:
Fols 79v–80r ስብሐት ለከ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ በአፈ፡ ኵሎ፡ ውዱስ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለከ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ቅዳሴ፡ ሥጋ፡ ወነፍስ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለከ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ከዕሩቃን፡ ልብስ፡ ስብሐትለከ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ዘኢትሠዓር፡ ንጉሥ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለከ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ቃለ፡ አብ፡
ውዱስ፡ በአብ፡ ፈናዊ፡ ወበወልድ፡ ተፈናዊ፡

Fol. 80r ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ አድኅነኒ፡ እመከራ፡ ሥጋ፡ ወነፍስ፡ ለገብርከ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም
፨ ፨ ፨ ፨ ፨

msItem.title: Malkǝʾa sanbat
msItem.incipit:
Fols 80v–81r በአብ፡ ፈናዊ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወተፈናዊ፡ ወበመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ማህያዊ፡ ወበማርየም፡ ወላዲቱ፡ ወሚካኤል፡ መልአከ፡ ምክሩ፡ ወገብርኤል፡ ዜናዌ፡ ትስብእቱ፡ በእንተ፡ ሰማዕታት፡ መዋዕያን፡ ወበእንተ፡ ጻድቃን፡ ቡሩካን፡ ወበእንተ፡ ደናግል፡ ወመነኮ
ሳት፡ ፍጹማን፡ ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዕቀበኒ፡ እመከራ፡ ሥጋ፡ ወነፍስ፡ ለገብርከ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨፨፨
Fol. 81r ሰላመ፡ ለዝክረ፡ ስምኪ፡ ጸዳለ፡ ምስራቅ፡ ወምእራብ፡ ሰሜን፡ ወደቡብ፡ ሰንበተ፡ ክርስቲ
msItem.explicit:
Fols 87r–87v ስብሃት፡ ለአብ፡ መፍቀሬ፡ ሰብ፡ ዘመጽአ፡ ወአድሃነነ፡ እምእደ፡ ጸላኢ፡ ዘአልቦ፡ ምህረት፡ ዘሰበረ፡ ሆሃተ፡ ብርት፡ ወቀጥቀጠ፡ መናስግተ፡ ዘሃፂን፡ ወዘአድከመ፡ ሀይለ፡ መሥቴማ፡ ዘገብረ፡ ዘንተ፡ ኵሎ፡
ወዘወሃበነ፡ እንቲዓሁ፡ ስልጣን፡ በዘ፡ ንክል፡ ንፍታህ፡ ለኩሉ፡ ማእሰር፡ ይእዜነ፡ ንሰብሖ፡ ለዘሎቱ፡ ይደሉ፡ ሥብሃት፡ ለአለመ፡ አለም። አሜን፡
msItem.note: The supplication at the beginning of the work is added in a different, possibly slightly later Hand 2.

msItem.title: Yǝweddǝsǝwwa malāʾǝkt la-Māryām
msItem.incipit: Fol. 89r ይዌድስዋ፡ መላእክት፡ ለማርያም፡ በውስተ፡ ውሳጤ፡ መንጦላእት፡ ወይብልዋ፡ በሐኪ፡ ማርያም፡ ሐዳስይ፡ ጣእዋ፡ ይቤላ፡ መላክ፡ ለማርያም፡ ወተወከፈዮ፡ ለቃል፡ ኀቤኪ፡ ይመጽእ፡ ወበማህጸነ፡ ዚአኪ፡ የሐድር፡ እፎ፡ ቤተ፡
msItem.explicit: Fols 94v–95r ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ዓመ፡ ይመጽእ፡ በስብሐት፡ አቡሁ፡ ምስለ፡ መላእክቲሁ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ አመ፡ ያቀውም፡ አባግዓ፡ በየማኑ፡ ወአግሌ፡ በፀጋሙ፡ ያቁመነ፡ በየማኑ፡ ምስለ፡ እስጢፋኖስ፡ ሰማዕት፡ ወዮሐንስ፡ መጥምቅ፡ ወምስለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ወሰማዕት፡ ለአለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፡ ለይኩን።

support.watermark: Watermarks visible on some leaves, i.e. on fols. 5, 63, 83, 91, 93. On fol. 88, a watermark of crescent with three stars.

material.note: Cream coloured, thin paper, slightly darker and thicker than
Cream coloured, thin paper. Maybe identical with .

support.note: Several types of paper have been used, of varying colour and quality, with watermarks visible on some of the leaves (cp. Fol. 88, moon with three stars).

supportDesc.foliation: Number 12 has been omitted in the foliation.

item.note: Fols. i, constitutes a bifolium with the leaf now glued to the, ii constitutes a bifolium with the leaf now glued to the inner board.
Stub between fols. 3, and 4, , stub between 13, and 14.
Stub between fols. 38, and 39, , stub between 41, and 42.
Fols 56r–59v constitute are inserted into the quire.
Stub before fols. 88, , stub between 90, and 91.

layoutDesc.summary:
The manuscript features multiple slight variations in the position and size of the written area (85-90 mm, 55-65 mm). Their boundaries mostly coincide with the discontinuities in paper and boundaries between the quires. The text is written in 1 column, 13 written lines per page up to fols. 61, , on fols 62–87, , it is 11 written lines. The upper written line is placed under the upper ruled line (except some folia, e.g. .). Apart from those described below, there are further discontinuities: of paper and written area fols 43v–44r, and fols 44v–45r, ; of paper fols 47v–48r, ; of paper and hand fols 55v–56r, ; of paper and hand on fols. 62r, ; of paper on fol. 88r
A misṭāra (ruler) was used for ruling.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 1r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 24r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 38r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 56r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 62r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 87r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 95r.
Variations in the size of the written area and the number of written lines on some folia.

handNote.seg: Incipits, ሰላም፡ ማርያም፡ ተክ፡ ሃይ፡ ክርስቶስ, parts of numerals and punctuation signs (not thorough) in Text I (‘Malkǝʾ-hymn to Takla Hāymānot’), ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ማርያም፡ ማርያም፡ numerals, parts of punctuation signs, explicit in Text II (‘Pray for us, Mary, Pray for us, Mary, to your Good Son Saviour of the World...’), incipit, ሰአ፡ ለነ፡, ጊዮ(ር)፡, ማርያም፡ in the name in the supplication, explicit in Text III (‘‘Sǝbḥata fǝqur’ of St George of Lydda), beginnings of prayers, indications for priest or people, parts of punctuation signs in Text IV (‘Covenant of the Morning’), ሰላም፡ መድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ማርያም፡, first words of stanzas towards the end, parts of punctuation signs, name in the supplication in Text V (‘Malkǝʾ-hymn to the Saviour of the World’), ሰላም፡ and occasionally the first word following it, ሰንበተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡, መንፈስ ቅዱስ፡, numerals, on ለሃዋርያቲሁ፡ ወልድ፡ fols. 86v, , ስብሃት፡ ለአብ፡ on fols. 88r, , ይእዜነ፡ ንስበሖ፡ ለዘሎቱ፡ on fol. 87v in Text VI (‘Malkǝʾ-hymn to the Sabbath’), incipit, ማርያም፡ and her attributes, ገብርኤል፡, names of saints, explicit in Text VII (‘The angels are praising Mary...’)
handNote.desc:
Irregular, almost crude; by a mediocre scribe. Parts of the text were written probably at different times, hence some variation in the hues of the inks, appearance of the script (e.g. slant and thickness of the strokes) and quality of the execution (diminishing after fol. 45). The hand seems to be very similar or identical to
Hand 1 of MS DS Ethiop. 8.
Regular, somewhat hasty; by a skilled scribe. The hand is very similar or identical to Hand 2 of MS DS Ethiop. 8.

item.desc: Note.
The owner, Gabra Māryām, is mentioned on fols. 80r, , fol. 81r and elsewhere.
Arabic titles added in pencil.
Stamps of the Library
Stamp of the Library
Arabic shelfmark
Arabic shelfmark
Stamp of the Library
Stamp of the Library
Stamps of the Library
Erasure in red and black on fol. 4r.
Omitted characters have been added above the line by the same hand.
Mistaken characters have been erased.
A mistaken word has been expunctuated and erased.
The characters of a word added by mistake have been marked in horizontal dashes above and below.
A mistaken word has been expunctuated with small red and black dashes.
Two words added by mistake have been striked out and enframed in red.
A line has been deleted with red and black ink.
Omitted characters have been added above the line, possibly by Hand 2.
Words added by mistake have been marked with black lines above and below.
Omitted text has been added in the bottom margin of fols. 81v, and the top margin of 82r by the same hand.

binding.decoNote: Bound in Egypt. Cardboard covered with blind-tooled leather. Endbands.

history.origin: حوالي ١٨٤٠-١٨٨٠ Ca 1840–1880. Parts of the manuscript were written in Egypt over a period of time, later gathered, trimmed and bound together. The name of Gabra Māryām, probably the commissioner and owner (possibly also the scribe of Hand 1), is mentioned in the supplications (e.g. Fols. 22v, 37r). The main Hand 1 may be the same as Hand 1 of MS DS Ethiop. 8, and Hand 2 the same as Hand 2 of MS DS Ethiop. 8 (cp. the description and dating of MS DS Ethiop. 8, above).

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Dorothea Reule: Added IDs and text
Dorothea Reule: Continued description and revision
Denis Nosnitsin: Continued description and revision
